questionText: Does your organization measure the impact of your portfolio on the environment?
questionKo: 귀사는 measure the impact of your 포트폴리오 on the environment입니까?
simpleHelp: Most of financial institutions' impact on the environment occurs in their portfolios, within the financial products and services they provide and/or in their investments that enable activities which have impact on the environment. Organizations in this sector should measure their portfolio impact using specific metrics to understand the impact their financial activities have on the environment and manage it properly. This question informs investors and other data users about the extent to which organizations understand their portfolios' environmental impact.

columns.text: We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate
options: Yes
No, but we plan to do so in the next two years
No, and we do not plan to do so in the next two years
columns.textKo: We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate
optionsKo: 예
No, but we plan to do so in the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to do so in the next two years

Other, please specify

guidance.text:
This question appears for organizations in the Financial Services sector who report in 1.10 that they undertake banking, investing and "General(non-life)" insurance underwriting activities. The question does not appear for organizations who report that they only insure "Life and/or Health".
Rows are presented according to the reported organizational activities.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 appears for organizations in the Financial Services sector who report in 1.10 that they undertake banking, investing 및 "일반(non-life)" insurance underwriting activities. The 문항 does not appear for organizations who report that they only insure "Life 및/또는 Health". 행 are presented according to the 보고 organizational activities.

guidance.text:
General 
This question is seeking to understand whether your organization evaluates its portfolio impact or financed emissions. Portfolio impact can be expressed in a number of metrics.
For details on methodologies to calculate carbon footprinting and exposure metrics please consult the CDP Technical Note on Portfolio Impact Metrics for Financial Services Sector Companies. 
You should complete all rows in this table.
In the columns: "We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate", "We measure the impact of our portfolio on forests", "We measure the impact of our portfolio on water" and "We measure the impact of our portfolio on biodiversity", the response option "Yes" will only appear for each row if you selected "Yes" in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" in the respective row of question 2.2.4.
We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate (column 1) 
The "Yes" dropdown option will only appear if you have reported having a process to assess your dependencies and impacts in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" in question 2.2.4
Select "Yes" if you measure how your portfolio impacts the climate via the activities you lend to, invest in and/or insure. In subsequent questions you should provide more details and disclose the portfolio emissions or other metrics, as listed above.
Disclosure metric (column 2) 
This column only appears if "Yes" is selected in column 1 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate".
Indicate which metrics you use to measure the impact of your portfolio on the climate.
Primary reason for not measuring portfolio impact on climate (column 3) 
This column only appears if any "No" option is selected in column 1 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate".
Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on climate (column 4) 
This column only appears if any "No" option is selected in column 1 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate".
Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization and provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your portfolio impacts the climate.
Include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your portfolio impact in the future and what metrics you are looking at using.
We measure the impact of our portfolio on forests (column 5) 
The "Yes" dropdown option will only appear if you have reported having a process to assess your dependencies and impacts in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" in question 2.2.4
Select "Yes" if you measure how your portfolio impacts the forests via the activities you lend to, invest in and/or insure. In subsequent questions you should provide more details and the metrics used.
Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on forests (column 7) 
This column only appears if any "No" option is selected in column 5 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on forests".
Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization and provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your portfolio impacts the forests.
You should also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your portfolio impact in the future and what metrics you are looking at using. 
We measure the impact of our portfolio on water (column 8) 
The "Yes" dropdown option will only appear if you have reported having a process to assess your dependencies and impacts in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" in question 2.2.4
Select "Yes" if you measure how your portfolio impacts water via the activities you lend to, invest in and/or insure. In subsequent questions you should provide more details and the metrics used.
Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on water (column 10) 
This column only appears if any "No" option is selected in column 8 "We measure our portfolio's the impact of our portfolio on water".
Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization and provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your portfolio impacts the forests.
You should also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your portfolio impact in the future and what metrics you are looking at using.
We measure the impact of our portfolio on biodiversity (column 11) 
The "Yes" dropdown option will only appear if you have reported having a process to assess your dependencies and impacts in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" in question 2.2.4
Select "Yes" if you measure how your portfolio impacts biodiversity via the activities you lend to, invest in and/or insure. In subsequent questions you may provide more details and the metrics used.
Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on biodiversity (column 13) 
This column only appears if any "No" option is selected in column 11 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on biodiversity".
Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization and provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your portfolio impacts biodiversity.
You should also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your portfolio impact in the future and what metrics you are looking at using.

For details on methodologies to calculate carbon footprinting 및 exposure metrics please consult the CDP Technical Note on 포트폴리오 Impact Metrics for Financial Services Sector Companies. You 해야 합니다 complete all 행 in this table. In the 열: "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate", "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on forests", "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on water" 및 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on biodiversity", the response option "예" will only appear for each 행 만약 you 선택 "예" in 열 1 "프로세스 in place covering this 포트폴리오" in the respective 행 of 문항 2.2.4. We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate (열 1) The "예" dropdown option will only appear 만약 you have 보고 having a 프로세스 to assess your dependencies 및 impacts in 열 1 "프로세스 in place covering this 포트폴리오" in 문항 2.2.4 Select "예" 만약 you measure how your 포트폴리오 impacts the climate via the activities you lend to, invest in 및/또는 insure. In subsequent questions you 해야 합니다 provide more details 및 disclose the 포트폴리오 emissions 또는 other metrics, as listed above. Disclosure metric (열 2) This 열 only appears 만약 "예" is 선택 in 열 1 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate". Indicate which metrics you use to measure the impact of your 포트폴리오 on the climate. 주된 이유 for not measuring 포트폴리오 impact on climate (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 하나 이상 "No" option is 선택 in 열 1 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate". 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on climate (열 4) This 열 only appears 만약 하나 이상 "No" option is 선택 in 열 1 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate". Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization 및 provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your 포트폴리오 impacts the climate. Include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your 포트폴리오 impact in the future 및 what metrics you are looking at using. We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on forests (열 5) The "예" dropdown option will only appear 만약 you have 보고 having a 프로세스 to assess your dependencies 및 impacts in 열 1 "프로세스 in place covering this 포트폴리오" in 문항 2.2.4 Select "예" 만약 you measure how your 포트폴리오 impacts the forests via the activities you lend to, invest in 및/또는 insure. In subsequent questions you 해야 합니다 provide more details 및 the metrics used. 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on forests (열 7) This 열 only appears 만약 하나 이상 "No" option is 선택 in 열 5 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on forests". Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization 및 provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your 포트폴리오 impacts the forests. You 해야 합니다 also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your 포트폴리오 impact in the future 및 what metrics you are looking at using. We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on water (열 8) The "예" dropdown option will only appear 만약 you have 보고 having a 프로세스 to assess your dependencies 및 impacts in 열 1 "프로세스 in place covering this 포트폴리오" in 문항 2.2.4 Select "예" 만약 you measure how your 포트폴리오 impacts water via the activities you lend to, invest in 및/또는 insure. In subsequent questions you 해야 합니다 provide more details 및 the metrics used. 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on water (열 10) This 열 only appears 만약 하나 이상 "No" option is 선택 in 열 8 "We measure our 포트폴리오's the impact of our 포트폴리오 on water". Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization 및 provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your 포트폴리오 impacts the forests. You 해야 합니다 also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your 포트폴리오 impact in the future 및 what metrics you are looking at using. We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on biodiversity (열 11) The "예" dropdown option will only appear 만약 you have 보고 having a 프로세스 to assess your dependencies 및 impacts in 열 1 "프로세스 in place covering this 포트폴리오" in 문항 2.2.4 Select "예" 만약 you measure how your 포트폴리오 impacts biodiversity via the activities you lend to, invest in 및/또는 insure. In subsequent questions you may provide more details 및 the metrics used. 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on biodiversity (열 13) This 열 only appears 만약 하나 이상 "No" option is 선택 in 열 11 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on biodiversity". Ensure your explanation is specific to the organization 및 provides details as to why you do not conduct analysis to understand how your 포트폴리오 impacts biodiversity. You 해야 합니다 also include details on whether you are exploring ways to measure your 포트폴리오 impact in the future 및 what metrics you are looking at using.

guidance.text: Financial institutions understand and manage the impact they have on the environment through measuring the impact each of their portfolios has on the different environmental themes.
guidance.textKo: Financial institutions understand 및 manage the impact they have on the environment through measuring the impact each 의ir 포트폴리오s has on the different environmental themes.

guidance.text:
Financed emissions: the absolute greenhouse gas emissions associated with a portfolio, expressed in tons CO2e. For financial institutions, the indirect emissions caused by their financing activities are relevant and their emissions inventory would be incomplete without accounting for them. The GHG Protocol classifies these emissions in Scope 3 Category 15 Investments. They are also known as portfolio emissions or financed emissions. Put simply, they are emissions that occur at sources owned or controlled by other companies, but which are made possible because those companies are financed by the investment and lending of financial institutions; and therefore are indirect to the financial institution and should be included in the financial institution's Scope 3 inventory.
Other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics: Metrics organizations in the financial sector can use to understand how their financial portfolio impacts the climate, as identified by the TCFD and to be used alongside portfolio emission metrics:
Carbon intensity: Volume of carbon emissions per million dollars of revenue (carbon efficiency of a portfolio), expressed in tons CO2e/Million revenue (in unit currency).
Weighted average carbon intensity: Portfolio's exposure to carbon-intensive companies, expressed in tons CO2e/Million revenue. This is the metric recommended by the TCFD.
Portfolio carbon footprint: Total carbon emissions for a portfolio normalized by the market value of the portfolio, expressed in tons CO2e/Million invested.
Portfolio: in the context of this questionnaire your portfolio is your entire collection of the core financing activities and insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities and loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For asset managers, this is the entire collection of your products and investments that you hold and/or manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds and investments owned and controlled by your company. For investment portfolios, asset managers should consider discretionary investments, those where the company has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products and insurance policies you provide to your clients.
Portfolio impact: impact of financial activities, namely lending, investment and insurance underwriting, on the environment.
guidance.textKo: 금융배출량: the absolute 온실가스 배출량 associated with a 포트폴리오, expressed in tons CO2e. For financial institutions, the indirect emissions caused by their financing activities are relevant 및 their emissions inventory would be incomplete without accounting 에 대한m. The GHG Protocol classifies these emissions in Scope 3 Category 15 Investments. They are also known as 포트폴리오 emissions 또는 금융배출량. Put simply, they are emissions that occur at sources owned 또는 controlled by other companies, but which are made possible because those companies are financed by the investment 및 lending of financial institutions; 및 therefore are indirect to the financial institution 및 해야 합니다 be included in the financial institution's Scope 3 inventory. Other carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure metrics: Metrics organizations in the financial sector can use to understand how their financial 포트폴리오 impacts the climate, as identified by the TCFD 및 to be used alongside 포트폴리오 emission metrics: Carbon intensity: Volume of carbon emissions per million dollars of 매출 (carbon efficiency of a 포트폴리오), expressed in tons CO2e/Million 매출 (in unit currency). Weighted average carbon intensity: 포트폴리오's exposure to carbon-intensive companies, expressed in tons CO2e/Million 매출. This is the metric recommended by the TCFD. 포트폴리오 carbon footprint: Total carbon emissions for a 포트폴리오 normalized by the market value 의 포트폴리오, expressed in tons CO2e/Million invested. 포트폴리오: in the context of this questionnaire your 포트폴리오 is your entire collection 의 core financing activities 및 insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities 및 loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For 자산운용사, this is the entire collection of your products 및 investments that you hold 및/또는 manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds 및 investments owned 및 controlled by your company. For investment 포트폴리오s, 자산운용사 해야 합니다 consider discretionary investments, those 여기서 the company has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products 및 insurance policies you provide to your clients. 포트폴리오 impact: impact of financial activities, namely lending, investment 및 insurance underwriting, on the environment.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in the following columns (if applicable) in proportion to the number of rows disclosed:
- 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate'
- 'Disclosure metric'
- 'Primary reason for not measuring portfolio impact on climate'
- 'Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on climate'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' NOT completed in all rows - 0/10 points
A maximum of 0/10 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 다음 열에 대해 해당되는 경우 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' - 'Disclosure metric' - '주된 이유 for not measuring 포트폴리오 impact on climate' - '그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on climate' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' NOT 완성 in all 행 - 0/10 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/10점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' - 3 points
OR
'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' - 1.5/3 points
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' NOT completed in all rows - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) Awareness 점수를 획득하려면 Disclosure에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 다음 기준에 따라 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 행별로 점수가 부여됩니다: '예' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' - 3 점 또는 'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' - 1.5/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' NOT 완성 in all 행 - 0/4 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
At least 0.5 Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
ROUTE A)
For any of the following rows (if applicable):
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' AND
Either 'Financed emissions' OR 'Other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
For row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' (if applicable):
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' AND column 'Disclosure metric' complete in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' AND column 'Explain why your organization does not measure its portfolio impact on climate' completed - 0.5/2 points
A maximum of 0.5/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'No, and we do not plan to do so in the next two years' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' NOT completed in all rows - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 최소 0.5 Awareness 점수를 획득해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for Management 점. 다음 기준에 따라 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 행별로 점수가 부여됩니다: 경로 A) 다음 항목 중 the following 행 (만약 해당되는 경우): - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' '예' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 그리고 Either '금융배출량' 또는 'Other carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' 선택 in 열 'Disclosure metric' - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 B) For 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' (만약 해당되는 경우): '예' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 그리고 열 'Disclosure metric' complete in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 그리고 열 '그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not measure its 포트폴리오 impact on climate' 완성 - 0.5/2 점 A 최고 of 0.5/2 점 is available for this 경로. 또는 경로 D) 'No, 및 we do not plan to do so in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' - 0/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' NOT 완성 in all 행 - 0/4 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in at least one row AND
Full Management points awarded - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in at least one row - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, and we do not plan to do so in the next two years' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in at least one row - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' NOT completed in all rows - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 최소 one 행 그리고 Management에서 최고점 획득 - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, but we plan to do so in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 최소 one 행 - 0/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/1점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 'No, 및 we do not plan to do so in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 최소 one 행 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' NOT 완성 in all 행 - 0/4 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/4점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: Most of financial institutions' impact on the environment occurs in their 포트폴리오s, within the financial 제품 및 서비스 they provide 및/또는 in their investments that enable activities which have impact on the environment. Organizations in this sector 해야 합니다 measure their 포트폴리오 impact using specific metrics to understand the impact their financial activities have on the environment 및 manage it properly. This 문항 informs investors 및 other 데이터 사용자 about the extent to which organizations understand their 포트폴리오s' environmental impact.
